name: calleeIsGlobalName
description: Returns true when a call's target is a global name equal to `nm`. Most commonly used helper in all CVE cases.
example:
calleeIsGlobalName(call, "eval") // matches eval(...)
calleeIsGlobalName(call, "open") // matches open(...)

name: calleeIsAttr
description: Matches calls whose function expression is an attribute read with a given attribute name. Essential for method calls.
example:
calleeIsAttr(call, "redirect") // matches obj.redirect(...)
calleeIsAttr(call, "write") // matches fp.write(...)

name: inTargetFile
description: Restricts nodes to a specific file by basename. Critical for noise reduction.

name: inPathPattern
description: Restricts nodes to files matching a regex pattern on relative path.

name: inTargetFunction
description: Restricts nodes to a specific function by name. Essential for function-level scoping.

name: isAffectedFunction
description: Checks if a function is in a list of vulnerable functions (common CVE pattern).

name: attrReceiverLooksLikeModule
description: Checks if the receiver of an attribute call looks like a specific module (django/flask/pandas/builtins).
implementation: exists(DataFlow::Node recv | recv = call.getFunction().(DataFlow::AttrRead).getObject() and (recv instanceof DataFlow::ModuleVariableNode or recv.asCfgNode().getNode() instanceof Name))

name: recvIsBuiltins
description: Checks if a receiver node is the 'builtins' module.

name: isRedirectCall
description: Comprehensive check for Django redirect calls (HttpResponseRedirect, redirect, shortcuts.redirect).
example: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call | isRedirectCall(call) and sink = call.getArg(0))

name: isEvalCall
description: Comprehensive check for eval-like calls (eval, exec, pandas.eval, builtins.eval, PIL.ImageMath.eval).
implementation: calleeIsGlobalName(call, "eval") or calleeIsGlobalName(call, "exec") or (calleeIsAttr(call, "eval") and attrReceiverIsLikelyEvalCarrier(call))
example: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call | isEvalCall(call) and sink = call.getArg(0))

name: isFileOpenCall
description: Checks if a call is to the built-in open() function.
example: isFileOpenCall(call) and sink = call.getArg(0) // path argument

name: isFileWriteReceiver
description: Checks if a node is the receiver of a .write() method call (file object).

name: isSQLExecutionCall
description: Checks if a call is a SQL execution method (execute, executemany, execute_query_).

name: isDjangoURLValidation
description: Checks if a node is validated by Django's URL validation functions (url_has_allowed_host_and_scheme, is_safe_url).
implementation: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call | (calleeIsGlobalName(call, "url_has_allowed_host_and_scheme") or calleeIsAttr(call, "url_has_allowed_host_and_scheme")) and n = call.getArg(0))

name: isReverseResult
description: Checks if a node is the result of Django's reverse() function (safe internal URL).
implementation: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call | n.asCfgNode().getNode() = call.getNode().getNode() and (calleeIsGlobalName(call, "reverse") or calleeIsAttr(call, "reverse")))

name: isLeadingSlashConst
description: Checks if a node is a string literal starting with '/' (safe relative path).

name: isParameterInFunction
description: Checks if a node is a parameter in a function matching the given pattern (qualified name regex).

name: parameterOfFunction
description: Returns true when `n` is a parameter node belonging to the function with the given name (new dataflow API safe pattern).
implementation: n instanceof DataFlow::ParameterNode and n.getScope().getName() = funcName

name: openToWriteFlowStep
description: Additional flow step: propagates taint from open() path argument to the returned file object.
implementation: exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call | calleeIsGlobalName(call, "open") and src = call.getArg(0) and dst = call)
